title: 有馬記念の後に・世紀末の始まり

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Can you hear it, the tolling of the new
generation's bell? Can you see it, the glimpse of
my evolution into the Centurial Overlord? I feel
both with my very soul.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Only I, the strongest, am worthy of inheriting the
history that the Golden Generation carved with
their cleats.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, my next objective is where only the truly
strong fight—the spring Tenno Sho!
